summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of the Boston Fall ’91 closing night, praised for its old‑school vibe and especially strong second set.
review: The recording is a soundboard (sbd) source with no reported technical problems, implying a clear and well‑balanced mix. Reviewers hail this final show of the run as the best of the series, highlighting an "old school" feel throughout and a particularly powerful second set. Overall it’s considered a standout performance worth hearing.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review emphasizes excellent show quality; recording source is soundboard with no complaints, leading to an overall high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity or mix; assumed clean soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes an "old school" feel to the whole concert with a particularly strong second set, ranking it third best in DeadBase XI for the run.
